sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_lambda (id Int32, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, map(x -> x * 2, [1, 2, 3]) AS doubled_values FROM test_lambda;
UPDATE test_lambda SET value = value + 5 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayMap(x -> x + 1, [value]) AS incremented_values FROM test_lambda;
